name: gridgeist
description: Design, redesign, and review distinctive product-native web interfaces with clear structure, brand fidelity, and verified behavior.

interface.shortDescription: Build product-native interfaces with clear structure.
interface.longDescription: Gridgeist helps Codex create, redesign, and review responsive web interfaces by adapting structure, typography, imagery, interaction, and product evidence to the established brand.
defaultPrompt: Use $gridgeist to design a distinctive product-native web interface.
Use $gridgeist to redesign this UI while preserving its brand and behavior.
Review this interface with $gridgeist and ground findings in rendered evidence.
